summary: Completed testing of 3 NEW FTRX features (Iteration 7): Activity Chart, FTRX balance display, Collect FTRX button, Refresh FTRX button. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly. CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: /api/admin/wallets endpoint now responds in < 5 seconds with batch JSON-RPC for 134 wallets.

critical_code_review_comments: Batch JSON-RPC implementation in volume_bot.py get_wallets_info() correctly fetches SOL balances for 50 wallets per HTTP request
FTRX balance uses bot's in-memory _token_holders cache (no RPC calls needed) - instant response
ActivityChart component (lines 775-876 in Admin.jsx) correctly uses recharts BarChart with BUY/SELL/TRANSFER color coding
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented: activity-chart, collect-ftrx-btn, refresh-ftrx-btn, collect-sol-btn
Polish language labels correct: 'Aktywnosc Bota', 'Zbierz caly FTRX', 'Odswiez FTRX', 'Zbierz caly SOL'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 NEW FTRX features fully tested and working: 1) Activity Chart shows BUY/SELL/TRANSFER timeline with recharts, 2) FTRX balance display in wallet header and individual wallets, 3) Collect FTRX button and Refresh FTRX button both functional. The critical /api/admin/wallets timeout issue from iteration 6 is FIXED - now uses batch JSON-RPC and responds in < 5 seconds for 134 wallets. Previous iteration tests (organic mode, wallet CRUD, distribute/collect SOL) still valid.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: Sequential RPC calls for each wallet
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Batch JSON-RPC (50 wallets per request) + memory cache for FTRX
